description_long: This is a rustic, three-layer cake with a generous amount of white whipped cream icing between each layer and on top. The cake is topped with a cluster of what appear to be roasted or caramelized nuts, possibly pistachios or hazelnuts, arranged in the center. The layers of cake are slightly uneven, giving it a homemade, artisanal appearance. The whipped cream is applied in thick, fluffy swirls, with some areas spilling over the edges. The cake's color palette is dominated by creamy whites and golden browns, with the nuts adding a touch of greenish-yellow. There is no visible plate or container beneath the cake, and it sits directly on a flat surface.
description: A rustic, three-layer cake with thick whipped cream icing and a topping of caramelized nuts, featuring a homemade, artisanal look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick whipped cream swirls and a dense cluster of nuts on top, with the uneven cake layers clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side profile, showing the cream oozing between layers and the nuts slightly off-center.
description_view_2: The cake's top and side are visible, emphasizing the fluffy cream and the irregular arrangement of the nuts.
description_view_3: A rear view with a clear look at the stacked layers and the spread of cream, with the nut topping still prominent.
